sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move green dot up 2, left 1 to reach top-left corner of container
action(['UP', 'UP', 'LEFT'])
print("Result:", last_action_result)
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        print(f"Green dot: [{min(p[0] for p in b)},{min(p[1] for p in b)}]-[{max(p[0] for p in b)},{max(p[1] for p in b)}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
